summary: Request to enable project-wide Nullable Reference Types in SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls by adding <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> to the .csproj, completing the partial per-file opt-ins already present.

reproEvidence.environmentDetails: SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls project — no platform or version restrictions

analysis.summary: The Controls project has per-file #nullable enable in SKCanvasView.cs and SKGLView.cs, but the csproj lacks <Nullable>Enable</Nullable>. The sibling Core project already has this enabled. AppHostBuilderExtensions.cs and RendererTypes.cs do not yet have per-file opt-ins, so enabling project-wide NRT would require fixing nullable warnings in those files.
analysis.rationale: Clearly an enhancement — no broken behavior, just a code-quality improvement. The issue is self-filed by a maintainer with status/long-term. The Core project already has Nullable enabled, confirming the intent. The Controls project partially uses #nullable enable at the file level; adding the project property completes the work and catches the remaining files.

keySignals.interpretation: Direct enhancement request to add <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> to the csproj

keySignals.text: <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> present in Core but absent in Controls
keySignals.interpretation: Core already done; Controls is the remaining gap

keySignals.text: #nullable enable present in SKCanvasView.cs and SKGLView.cs, absent in AppHostBuilderExtensions.cs and RendererTypes.cs
keySignals.interpretation: Partial adoption — project-level setting needed to enforce uniformly

codeInvestigation.finding: No <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> property in PropertyGroup — project-level NRT is disabled
<Nullable>Enable</Nullable> is already present in Core, establishing the pattern
#nullable enable at top of file — per-file opt-in already present
No #nullable enable — will require nullable annotation fixes once project-level NRT is enabled

nextQuestions: Are there any nullable warnings in AppHostBuilderExtensions.cs or RendererTypes.cs that need addressing before this can be merged?
Should GetPropertyValueEventArgs<T>.Value in RendererTypes.cs be annotated as nullable?

resolution.hypothesis: Add <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> to SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls.csproj and fix any resulting NRT warnings in AppHostBuilderExtensions.cs and RendererTypes.cs.

proposals.title: Add Nullable=Enable to Controls csproj
proposals.description: Add <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> to the PropertyGroup in SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls.csproj, then resolve any NRT warnings in the remaining files.

resolution.recommendedReason: Straightforward one-property addition following the existing Core pattern; minimal scope.

actionability.reason: Valid, low-risk enhancement filed by a maintainer and tagged status/long-term. No blocker — implementation path is clear, but it requires dedicated effort to fix NRT warnings across the project.

actions.description: Ensure type/enhancement and area/SkiaSharp.Views.Maui labels are applied
